---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the scenario where it's needed.

## Proposed Solution

How you envision this working. Include configuration examples if applicable:

```yaml
# Example configuration for the new feature
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Category

- [ ] New service monitor (e.g., new database, message broker, etc.)
- [ ] New transport publisher (e.g., new chat platform, observability tool)
- [ ] Dashboard / UI enhancement
- [ ] Configuration / DX improvement
- [ ] Performance / scalability
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
